overall.description: Game engine footage depicting a tropical beach resort at dusk, with the camera walking along the shoreline past wooden beach huts and palm trees. The clip transitions abruptly to a bright mountain waterfall scene with sun flare, identified by on-screen text as 'Duelo Falls'.

segments.scene_description: A first-person walk along a tropical beach at dusk, with warm golden light illuminating wooden beach huts and palm trees. The camera moves steadily along the sandy shore past scattered driftwood, with the ocean visible to the right and dense vegetation to the left. The scene is tranquil and devoid of people, showcasing the natural and built environment of a coastal resort area.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain waterfall viewpoint with rocky cliffs

events.description: abrupt cut from beach scene to mountain waterfall environment with bright sun flare
on-screen text 'Duelo Falls' appears in bottom left corner identifying the location

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing the waterfall with bright sun flare and mist spray

entered.detail: tall cascading waterfall flowing down rocky cliff face with heavy mist
steep moss-covered rock formation with vegetation on top
bright lens flare from sun positioned behind the cliff edge
water mist rising from the base of the waterfall
white text overlay reading 'Duelo Falls' identifying the location

segments.scene_description: The scene cuts to a dramatic mountain waterfall illuminated by bright sunlight creating lens flare. The camera remains stationary, capturing the cascading water and mist against the rocky cliff face. On-screen text identifies the location as 'Duelo Falls', suggesting this is a discovered landmark within a game environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a tranquil tropical shoreline at dusk to a bright, dramatic mountain waterfall. It begins with a steady first-person walk along a sandy beach, passing wooden huts and palm trees under a warm golden light. As the camera moves past scattered driftwood with the ocean to the right and dense vegetation to the left, the serene coastal atmosphere suddenly shifts. The scene then opens abruptly onto a sun-drenched rocky cliff face where cascading water and mist create a vivid lens flare. Finally, the camera holds stationary at this new landmark as on-screen text identifies the location as Duelo Falls.
